data.text/markdown:
Picking File

We'll use the built in file browser to access our .tsv file.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='vblA-0' random-id='eed11346-c964-6567-b27d-9f3d7c644b38'><marimo-file-browser data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-initial-path='"/home/oscar/github/bam_rs/notebook"' data-selection-mode='"file"' data-filetypes='[]' data-multiple='true' data-restrict-navigation='false'></marimo-file-browser></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown:
Reading File

We'll use polars to read a relatively large .tsv file. Specifically, we have aligned reads against a reference and have extracted information about coverage and deletion rates. To improve performance, only the first 500000 positions are used.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='lEQa-0' random-id='fc98c6e9-5cd4-9996-16ff-6d55c5006164'><marimo-number data-initial-value='50000' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Num positions to use</span></span>"' data-start='1' data-stop='1000000' data-step='1' data-debounce='true' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-number></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='PKri-0' random-id='7a3ca68b-2cdd-460e-e1bd-2d3e908fb59e'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data.text/markdown:
Plotting a DataFrame

Here, we use altair to produce some nice, interactive plots.

Visualizing coverage

We will plot sequencing depth as a function of position. By creating an interactive input, we can decide what data points we want to include. Change the start, end and depth thresholds to view the impact.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='BYtC-6' random-id='c1e99a66-c1f2-3bfa-9084-8e0112c3fb02'><marimo-dict data-initial-value='{"start":1,"end":1000,"depth":[1,80]}' data-label='null' data-element-ids='{"BYtC-3":"start","BYtC-4":"end","BYtC-5":"depth"}'><marimo-json-output data-json-data='{"start":"text/html:<marimo-ui-element object-id='BYtC-3' random-id='cceefa33-1e7a-52b7-d01b-a89803bbd711'><marimo-number data-initial-value='1' data-label='&quot;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents&#92;&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;paragraph&#92;&quot;&gt;Start&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&quot;' data-start='0' data-stop='500000' data-step='1' data-debounce='true' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-number></marimo-ui-element>","end":"text/html:<marimo-ui-element object-id='BYtC-4' random-id='5be9a4e5-1405-c05f-0a79-fe802c4460ff'><marimo-number data-initial-value='1000' data-label='&quot;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents&#92;&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;paragraph&#92;&quot;&gt;End&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&quot;' data-start='0' data-stop='500000' data-step='1' data-debounce='true' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-number></marimo-ui-element>","depth":"text/html:<marimo-ui-element object-id='BYtC-5' random-id='39ae2622-5cb1-cd6e-d0ac-0fe8e8388fbc'><marimo-range-slider data-initial-value='[1,80]' data-label='&quot;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents&#92;&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;paragraph&#92;&quot;&gt;Depth&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&quot;' data-start='1' data-stop='80' data-step='1' data-steps='[]' data-debounce='true' data-orientation='&quot;horizontal&quot;' data-show-value='true' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-range-slider></marimo-ui-element>"}' data-value-types='"python"' data-name='"dictionary"'></marimo-json-output></marimo-dict></marimo-ui-element>
If the plot is empty, try bumping the end threshold to be larger than start.

data.text/markdown:
Visualizing base quality

We have the mean base quality per reference base. We can visualize this to look for potential bias.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='nWHF-0' random-id='87c37bb8-62f7-fe5e-cb4f-53cb1fe16701'><marimo-vega data-initial-value='{}' data-label='null' data-spec='{"config":{"view":{"continuousWidth":300,"continuousHeight":300}},"data":{"url":"./@file/64005701-66196-4QLJE4Mh.arrow","format":{"type":"arrow"}},"mark":{"type":"boxplot"},"encoding":{"color":{"field":"ref","type":"nominal"},"x":{"field":"ref","type":"nominal"},"y":{"field":"base_phred","type":"quantitative"}},"title":"Base quality per reference base","width":300,"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v6.1.0.json"}' data-chart-selection='true' data-field-selection='true' data-embed-options='{}'></marimo-vega></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown:
Visualizing depth

We have the depth per reference base. We can visualize this to look for potential bias.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='ZHCJ-0' random-id='a76a9cf6-2fdd-8b72-01c8-8826e2d3bfdb'><marimo-vega data-initial-value='{}' data-label='null' data-spec='{"config":{"view":{"continuousWidth":300,"continuousHeight":300}},"data":{"url":"./@file/64005701-66196-psHRxiGG.arrow","format":{"type":"arrow"}},"mark":{"type":"boxplot"},"encoding":{"color":{"field":"ref","type":"nominal"},"x":{"field":"ref","type":"nominal"},"y":{"field":"depth","type":"quantitative"}},"title":"Depth per reference base","width":300,"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v6.1.0.json"}' data-chart-selection='true' data-field-selection='true' data-embed-options='{}'></marimo-vega></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown:
Identifying Deletions

Maybe, we find it interesting to find positions with a large deletion fraction. We can visualize this with a scatter plot of the deletion fraction against sequencing depth.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='qnkX-4' random-id='453cba61-4cdf-5dbb-ed7d-3742147ac803'><marimo-dict data-initial-value='{"min_frac_deletion":0.5,"depth":[1,80]}' data-label='null' data-element-ids='{"qnkX-2":"min_frac_deletion","qnkX-3":"depth"}'><marimo-json-output data-json-data='{"min_frac_deletion":"text/html:<marimo-ui-element object-id='qnkX-2' random-id='00cc1450-df30-017c-27c2-c7d1d5fab8d4'><marimo-number data-initial-value='0.5' data-label='&quot;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents&#92;&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;paragraph&#92;&quot;&gt;Minimum Deletion Fraction&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&quot;' data-start='0.1' data-stop='1.0' data-step='0.1' data-debounce='true' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-number></marimo-ui-element>","depth":"text/html:<marimo-ui-element object-id='qnkX-3' random-id='1f067975-54f1-195a-1f2a-0ba10f21baa4'><marimo-range-slider data-initial-value='[1,80]' data-label='&quot;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents&#92;&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&#92;&quot;paragraph&#92;&quot;&gt;Depth&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&quot;' data-start='1' data-stop='80' data-step='1' data-steps='[]' data-debounce='true' data-orientation='&quot;horizontal&quot;' data-show-value='true' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false'></marimo-range-slider></marimo-ui-element>"}' data-value-types='"python"' data-name='"dictionary"'></marimo-json-output></marimo-dict></marimo-ui-element>
